author: doll-agent
content: Closed: gemm_bf16_f32 + gemm_f16_f32 entry points shipped behind bf16/f16 cargo features. Widen-then-SGEMM strategy reuses the entire SGEMM scaffolding (parallel + AVX-512 dispatch). 5 new mixed-precision tests pass; full test suite + clippy + stat-equiv 47/47 clean. AVX-512 BF16 native kernel via vdpbf16ps captured as future work.
